ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 3 Days Left
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a quick reminder that the semester project submissions are due on Friday, May 24th. Please ensure your project reports, code, and supporting documentation are uploaded to the course portal by 5:00 pm. Late submissions will be accepted only with an approved extension.

If you need any assistance or clarification, feel free to reach out.

Looking forward to seeing your work!

Best,
[Professor Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Action Needed Immediately
spam.body:
Dear Valued QuickBooks Customer,

We have detected an outstanding invoice (Invoice #12345678) for your QuickBooks subscription. Failure to settle this balance within the next 48 hours will result in suspension of your account and loss of access to essential features. Please review the invoice details and make a payment promptly.

To view the invoice, click <URL>. Alternatively, you can log in to your QuickBooks account and verify the amount.

If you believe this is an error, please contact QuickBooks support immediately. For security, do not provide personal information via email.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
QuickBooks Billing Team
